scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:d1:create: wrangler d1 migrations create DB --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
